notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Jorge Soler out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Jorge Soler out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Travis d'Arnaud GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Travis d'Arnaud grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Bryce Teodosio out at 2nd. Travis d'Arnaud out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Teodosio challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jo Adell steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Carter Jensen. Adam Frazier scores. Mike Trout to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field. Carter Jensen scores. Maikel Garcia scores.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, second baseman Adam Frazier to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Vinnie Pasquantino out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Maikel Garcia pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Maikel Garcia pops out to first baseman Nolan Schanuel in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Jac Caglianone homers (2) on a fly ball to right field. Salvador Perez scores.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
